channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Nuclear Power Partnership: Google Agrees to Buy 500 Megawatts from Small Modular Reactors
item.description: Google's historic agreement with Kairos Power aims to meet electricity demand for artificial intelligence, marking a significant step in the tech giant's efforts to reduce its carbon footprint.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: The Global Space Race Heats Up: NASA, China, Europe, and SpaceX Compete in Earth's Orbit and on the Moon
item.description: The world's space agencies are meeting in Milan as geopolitical rivalry fuels a new global race in Earth's orbit and on the moon. Private companies are heavily involved, with SpaceX leading the way.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: Bankinter and Microsoft Partner to Revolutionize Work with AI-Powered Microsoft 365 Copilot
item.description: Bankinter, in partnership with Microsoft, has been implementing Microsoft 365 Copilot in various areas of the bank for about a year. The goal is to test the generative AI solution from Redmond in internal tasks related to data extraction and processing.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: Windows Users Targeted by Sophisticated Malware: What You Need to Know
item.description: Cybersecurity experts warn of a new type of malware spreading through fake human verification pages on Windows devices.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
